families.officialGrammar: #RGB, #RRGGBB, #RRGGBBAA, 0x hex, rgb(RRGGBB), rgb(r,g,b), rgba(RRGGBBAA), rgba(r,g,b,a), and numeric integer forms via ParserUtils/configStringToInt.
families.recommendedFutureAction: broaden or explicitly document conservative subset; add source-level tests for # forms and comma rgb/rgba before repair

families.officialGrammar: space-separated color tokens plus optional deg angle token; at least one color; max 10 colors; color tokens use official color parser; angle is parsed by stoi-like integer degree logic.
families.recommendedFutureAction: adopt source color grammar if broadening color; enforce max 10 colors; decide angle integer/float policy by temp/source tests

families.officialGrammar: exactly two float tokens separated by a single space in hyprlang VEC2 parsing; some rows add source validators such as vec2Range.
families.recommendedFutureAction: prefer official space-separated serialization; remove comma output or keep only as typed compatibility after explicit parser proof; add row-specific range validators where source has vec2Range

families.officialGrammar: Hyprland String values are parser-unconstrained at config value type level; row consumers may add semantics.
families.recommendedFutureAction: keep line-safe guardrails unless row-specific source consumer requires broader semantics

families.officialGrammar: String values in ConfigValues; path existence/expansion semantics are consumer-specific or absent in inspected source.
families.recommendedFutureAction: keep sanitized path guardrail; inspect each consumer before adding existence or expansion semantics

families.officialGrammar: String values at config level; regex compilation/consumer behavior is not proven by ConfigValues alone.
families.recommendedFutureAction: inspect consumer compile path before deciding whether to validate regex syntax

families.officialGrammar: Device/input consumer semantics are not fully proven by ConfigValues; current app scroll_points validator remains source-research-needed.
families.recommendedFutureAction: inspect input scroll_points consumer before changing grammar or bounds

rows.recommendedPreviousAction: Inspect official color parser/source for accepted literal formats, alpha handling, named colors if any, and invalid forms; then decide whether app color parser is exact, too broad, or too narrow.
rows.officialGrammarFinding: #RGB, #RRGGBB, #RRGGBBAA, 0x hex, rgb(RRGGBB), rgb(r,g,b), rgba(RRGGBBAA), rgba(r,g,b,a), and numeric integer forms via ParserUtils/configStringToInt.
rows.recommendedFutureAction: broaden or explicitly document conservative subset; add source-level tests for # forms and comma rgb/rgba before repair
